title: Sokoura Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Sokoura with a Z-Score of +3.49. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Sokoura is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 11.2 GG. 
 The humidity level is at 44%, and the wind speed is 5.7 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, while the CDD is significantly high.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately due to the critical heat wave conditions.
